synopsis:
Doctor Aphra (2020) Vol. 7: Dark Droids
A canon trade paperback collecting issues #32-39 from Marvel Comics Doctor Aphra (2020) Series
Doctor Aphra teams up with Luke Skywalker...but she might have ulterior plans that could spell trouble for the young Jedi!
LUKE SKYWALKER: FRIEND OR FOE? After the fallout of HIDDEN EMPIRE, Doctor Aphra is at a crossroads. Who better to help her with that than…Luke Skywalker?! But when Aphra convinces Luke that she can help him find long-lost secrets of the Jedi, she sets another plan in motion for the young Skywalker...a plan that involves none other than Darth Vader!
Collecting: Star Wars: Doctor Aphra (2020) #32-40
title: Doctor Aphra (2020) Vol. 7: Dark Droids
